description: NutriFlow food dataset v0.8.1 — 251 dishes across 20+ world cuisines
author: Guardian4002
license: All Rights Reserved. No part of this dataset may be reproduced, distributed, or used commercially without explicit written permission from the author.

dishes.name: Nasi Lemak
dishes.description: Fragrant coconut rice with sambal, boiled egg, cucumber, and crispy anchovies. A classic Malaysian breakfast.

dishes.name: Roti Canai with Dhal
dishes.description: Flaky flatbread served with lentil curry. A popular Malaysian Indian breakfast.

dishes.name: Oats with Banana and Peanut Butter
dishes.description: Creamy rolled oats topped with sliced banana and a scoop of peanut butter for sustained energy.

dishes.name: Egg White Omelette with Spinach
dishes.description: Light, high-protein omelette filled with wilted spinach and cherry tomatoes. Perfect for fat loss.

dishes.name: Milo and Roti Bakar
dishes.description: Toasted bread with butter and kaya jam, paired with a warm Milo drink. Classic kopitiam breakfast.

dishes.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
dishes.description: Layers of thick Greek yogurt, fresh berries, and granola for a protein-rich start to the day.

dishes.name: Banana Protein Smoothie
dishes.description: Blended banana with protein powder, oats, and almond milk — a quick grab-and-go breakfast.

dishes.name: Congee (Bubur Ayam)
dishes.description: Silky rice porridge with shredded chicken, ginger, and fried shallots. Light yet nourishing.

dishes.name: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
dishes.description: Smashed avocado on wholegrain toast, topped with a runny poached egg and chili flakes.

dishes.name: Weetabix with Low-Fat Milk
dishes.description: Two Weetabix biscuits with cold low-fat milk — simple, filling, high-fibre breakfast.

dishes.name: Grilled Chicken Rice
dishes.description: Tender grilled chicken thigh served over jasmine rice with steamed vegetables and light sauce.

dishes.name: Char Kway Teow
dishes.description: Stir-fried flat rice noodles with prawns, egg, bean sprouts, and chives in dark soy sauce.

dishes.name: Mee Goreng Mamak
dishes.description: Spicy stir-fried yellow noodles with tofu, egg, potato, and tomato sauce. A mamak stall staple.

dishes.name: Chicken Breast Salad
dishes.description: Sliced grilled chicken breast over mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, and balsamic dressing.

dishes.name: Tuna Brown Rice Bowl
dishes.description: Flaked canned tuna over nutty brown rice with edamame, avocado, and sesame dressing.

dishes.name: Nasi Ayam (Hainanese Chicken Rice)
dishes.description: Poached chicken served with fragrant chicken-fat rice, cucumber slices, and sauces.

dishes.name: Laksa Asam
dishes.description: Tangy fish-based noodle soup with thick rice noodles, fresh herbs, and assam (tamarind) broth.

dishes.name: Vegetable Curry with Roti
dishes.description: Mixed vegetable curry with potatoes, cauliflower, and chickpeas in aromatic coconut gravy.

dishes.name: Salmon Fillet with Quinoa
dishes.description: Pan-seared salmon fillet served with fluffy quinoa and steamed asparagus. Rich in omega-3.

dishes.name: Beef Rendang with Rice
dishes.description: Slow-cooked spiced beef in rich coconut milk gravy, served with steamed white rice.

dishes.name: Tofu and Vegetable Stir-Fry
dishes.description: Crispy tofu cubes stir-fried with bell peppers, broccoli, and garlic in oyster sauce.

dishes.name: Beef Burger with Salad
dishes.description: Grilled beef patty in a bun with lettuce, tomato, and light mayo — comfort food done right.

dishes.name: Lentil Soup with Bread
dishes.description: Hearty red lentil soup with cumin, turmeric, and lemon. Filling, plant-based protein.

dishes.name: Pasta Aglio e Olio
dishes.description: Classic Italian pasta with garlic, olive oil, parsley, and chili flakes — simple and delicious.

dishes.name: Sotong Goreng Tepung (Fried Squid)
dishes.description: Crispy battered squid rings with dipping sauce. Popular Malaysian hawker dish.

dishes.name: Baked Chicken Thigh with Sweet Potato
dishes.description: Herb-marinated chicken thigh baked until golden, served with roasted sweet potato wedges.

dishes.name: Ikan Bakar (Grilled Fish)
dishes.description: Whole fish marinated in sambal and wrapped in banana leaf, grilled over charcoal.

dishes.name: Chicken Porridge (Bubur Ayam)
dishes.description: Comforting chicken and rice porridge topped with ginger, spring onion, and sesame oil.

dishes.name: Steak with Mashed Potato
dishes.description: Pan-seared lean beef steak with creamy mashed potato and steamed green beans.

dishes.name: Tom Yam Soup with Rice
dishes.description: Spicy-sour Thai-inspired soup with prawns, mushrooms, and lemongrass served with rice.

dishes.name: Egg Fried Rice
dishes.description: Wok-tossed jasmine rice with scrambled eggs, mixed vegetables, and light seasoning.

dishes.name: Dhal with Chapati
dishes.description: Slow-cooked spiced yellow lentils with garlic-tomato tempering, served with wholegrain chapati.

dishes.name: Prawn Stir-Fry with Broccoli
dishes.description: Juicy prawns wok-tossed with broccoli florets in garlic-oyster sauce. Quick and nutritious.

dishes.name: Black Pepper Beef with Noodles
dishes.description: Tender beef slices in bold black pepper sauce served over egg noodles with bok choy.

dishes.name: Vegetable Fried Rice (No Egg)
dishes.description: Vegan-friendly wok fried rice with carrots, peas, corn, and light soy sauce.

dishes.name: Boiled Egg
dishes.description: Simple hard-boiled egg. High protein, minimal calories, portable snack.

dishes.name: Apple with Almond Butter
dishes.description: Crisp apple slices with a tablespoon of almond butter. Fibre plus healthy fats.

dishes.name: Banana
dishes.description: A single ripe banana. Fast energy, natural sugars, and potassium.

dishes.name: Mixed Nuts (30g)
dishes.description: A small handful of almonds, walnuts, and cashews. Satisfying, energy-dense snack.

dishes.name: Low-Fat Chocolate Milk
dishes.description: A glass of low-fat chocolate milk — a popular post-workout recovery drink.

dishes.name: Karipap (Curry Puff)
dishes.description: Flaky pastry filled with spiced potato and chicken. Popular Malaysian teatime snack.

dishes.name: Protein Bar
dishes.description: Commercial protein bar with ~20g protein, low sugar. Good for on-the-go fuelling.

dishes.name: Edamame (Steamed)
dishes.description: Salted steamed edamame pods. Plant-based protein hit with minimal prep.

dishes.name: Pisang Goreng (Fried Banana)
dishes.description: Crispy battered banana fritters. A beloved Malaysian street snack.

dishes.name: Carrot Sticks with Hummus
dishes.description: Crunchy carrot sticks with creamy chickpea hummus. Fibre-rich, low-calorie snack.

dishes.name: Rice Crackers with Cottage Cheese
dishes.description: Light rice crackers with a dollop of cottage cheese and cucumber slices.

dishes.name: Ais Kacang (Ice Kacang)
dishes.description: Malaysian shaved ice dessert with red bean, corn, jelly, and rose syrup. Best enjoyed as an occasional treat.

dishes.name: Overnight Oats (Prep Ahead)
dishes.description: Rolled oats soaked overnight with chia seeds, almond milk, and mixed berries. Zero morning prep.

dishes.name: Nasi Campur (Mixed Rice)
dishes.description: White rice served with an assortment of side dishes — typically 2–3 protein and vegetable options from the warung counter.

dishes.name: Sarawak Laksa
dishes.description: Rich coconut-based noodle soup with vermicelli, prawns, chicken, and sambal belacan. A Sarawak specialty.

dishes.name: Pineapple Fried Rice
dishes.description: Fragrant fried rice with pineapple chunks, cashews, and raisins. Served in a halved pineapple shell.

dishes.name: Ayam Masak Merah
dishes.description: Chicken pieces simmered in a spicy tomato-based sauce with lemongrass and dried chilies.

dishes.name: Tuna Sandwich (Wholegrain)
dishes.description: Canned tuna mixed with light mayo on toasted wholegrain bread with lettuce and tomato.

dishes.name: Tofu Scramble
dishes.description: Crumbled firm tofu sautéed with turmeric, nutritional yeast, and vegetables — a vegan egg alternative.

dishes.name: Chicken Caesar Salad
dishes.description: Romaine lettuce with grilled chicken, croutons, parmesan, and Caesar dressing.

dishes.name: Spaghetti Bolognese
dishes.description: Classic beef mince ragu over spaghetti with tomato sauce, herbs, and grated parmesan.

dishes.name: Miso Soup with Tofu
dishes.description: Light Japanese-style miso broth with silken tofu, seaweed, and spring onion.

dishes.name: Nihari
dishes.description: Slow-cooked spiced beef shank stew with ginger, fried onions, and fresh coriander. A rich Pakistani breakfast classic.

dishes.name: Chicken Karahi
dishes.description: Tender chicken pieces cooked in a cast-iron wok with tomatoes, green chilies, and fragrant spices.

dishes.name: Dal Chawal
dishes.description: Yellow lentils tempered with cumin and garlic served over steamed basmati rice. The ultimate Pakistani comfort meal.

dishes.name: Seekh Kebab with Naan
dishes.description: Minced beef kebabs seasoned with onion, coriander and spices, grilled on skewers and served with naan and raita.

dishes.name: Haleem
dishes.description: Slow-cooked wheat, lentils and beef blended into a thick, spiced porridge. One of Pakistan's most protein-rich dishes.

dishes.name: Paratha with Omelette
dishes.description: Crispy layered flatbread served with a spiced egg omelette. A quick and filling Pakistani breakfast.

dishes.name: Biryani (Chicken)
dishes.description: Aromatic basmati rice layered with spiced chicken, caramelized onions, saffron and whole spices.

dishes.name: Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani)
dishes.description: Tender chicken in a rich, creamy tomato-butter sauce with aromatic spices. India's most beloved curry.

dishes.name: Masoor Dal
dishes.description: Red lentil soup tempered with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and tomato. A light and nutritious Indian staple.

dishes.name: Palak Paneer
dishes.description: Cubes of fresh paneer simmered in a silky, spiced spinach gravy. A classic North Indian vegetarian dish.

dishes.name: Idli with Sambar
dishes.description: Steamed fermented rice cakes served with a tangy lentil-vegetable soup and coconut chutney. South Indian breakfast.

dishes.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
dishes.description: Marinated grilled chicken in a bold, tangy tomato-cream masala sauce with aromatic whole spices.

dishes.name: Chole Bhature
dishes.description: Spiced chickpea curry served with deep-fried puffed bread. A hearty, indulgent North Indian meal.

dishes.name: Rajma with Rice
dishes.description: Slow-cooked red kidney beans in a thick, spiced onion-tomato gravy served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Masala Dosa
dishes.description: Crispy fermented rice crepe filled with spiced potato and onion, served with sambar and chutneys.

dishes.name: Croque Monsieur
dishes.description: Classic French toasted sandwich with ham, melted Gruyère cheese, and béchamel sauce. A Parisian café staple.

dishes.name: Soupe à l'Oignon
dishes.description: Slow-caramelized French onion soup topped with toasted baguette and melted Comté cheese.

dishes.name: Salade Niçoise
dishes.description: A composed Provençal salad with tuna, soft-boiled eggs, green beans, olives, and anchovies in vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Quiche Lorraine
dishes.description: Buttery pastry filled with a creamy egg and bacon custard. A classic from the Lorraine region of France.

dishes.name: Ratatouille with Crusty Bread
dishes.description: Slow-roasted Provençal vegetable stew of zucchini, eggplant, tomato, and peppers with herbs de Provence.

dishes.name: Poulet Rôti (Roast Chicken)
dishes.description: Golden herb-roasted half chicken with garlic butter, served with roasted potatoes and green beans.

dishes.name: Crêpes with Berries
dishes.description: Thin French crêpes with whipped cream, fresh strawberries and a drizzle of honey. A light sweet breakfast.

dishes.name: Kung Pao Chicken
dishes.description: Stir-fried diced chicken with peanuts, dried chilies, and Sichuan peppercorns in a sweet-savory sauce.

dishes.name: Dim Sum Platter
dishes.description: A selection of steamed dumplings: har gow (prawn), siu mai (pork & prawn), and cheung fun rice rolls.

dishes.name: Mapo Tofu
dishes.description: Silken tofu and minced pork in a fiery, numbing Sichuan sauce with fermented black beans and chili oil.

dishes.name: Wonton Noodle Soup
dishes.description: Clear pork broth with springy egg noodles and pork-prawn wontons. A Cantonese breakfast and lunch classic.

dishes.name: Sweet and Sour Pork
dishes.description: Crispy battered pork pieces tossed with pineapple, bell peppers, and a glossy sweet-sour sauce.

dishes.name: Congee with Century Egg & Pork
dishes.description: Silky rice porridge topped with century egg, shredded pork, ginger threads, and crispy youtiao (doughstick).

dishes.name: Steamed Fish with Ginger & Soy
dishes.description: Whole fish steamed to perfection, finished with hot sesame oil, shredded ginger, and light soy sauce.

dishes.name: Fried Rice with Egg and Vegetables
dishes.description: Classic Chinese wok-fried rice with scrambled egg, peas, corn, and carrots in light soy sauce.

dishes.name: Kabuli Pulao
dishes.description: Afghanistan's national dish — fragrant basmati rice cooked with lamb, caramelized carrots, raisins, and toasted almonds.

dishes.name: Bolani
dishes.description: Afghan stuffed flatbread filled with spiced potato and leek, pan-fried until golden and crispy.

dishes.name: Qorma-e-Sabzi (Spinach Lamb Stew)
dishes.description: Slow-cooked lamb with spinach, dried fruit, and warm spices. A hearty Afghan winter stew.

dishes.name: Mantu (Afghan Dumplings)
dishes.description: Steamed beef-filled dumplings topped with yogurt, tomato sauce and split peas. A beloved Afghan feast dish.

dishes.name: Shorba (Afghan Lamb Soup)
dishes.description: Clear fragrant lamb broth with chickpeas, potatoes, tomatoes and fresh herbs. Simple and deeply warming.

dishes.name: Aushak (Leek Dumplings with Yogurt)
dishes.description: Boiled leek-filled pasta dumplings topped with garlicky yogurt and spiced tomato-lamb sauce.

dishes.name: Firni (Afghan Milk Pudding)
dishes.description: Delicately spiced rose-water and cardamom rice flour pudding. A classic Afghan dessert served chilled.

dishes.name: Chicken Teriyaki Bowl
dishes.description: Grilled chicken glazed with sweet soy teriyaki sauce, served over steamed Japanese rice with sesame seeds and spring onion.

dishes.name: Salmon Sashimi
dishes.description: Fresh sliced raw salmon served with pickled ginger, wasabi and light soy sauce. High protein, omega-3 rich.

dishes.name: Ramen (Shoyu)
dishes.description: Rich soy-based chicken broth noodle soup topped with chashu pork, soft-boiled egg, nori and bamboo shoots.

dishes.name: Tonkatsu with Rice
dishes.description: Crispy panko-breaded pork cutlet served with shredded cabbage, tonkatsu sauce and steamed rice.

dishes.name: Edamame and Gyoza
dishes.description: Steamed and pan-fried pork-and-cabbage dumplings with salted edamame — a Japanese izakaya classic.

dishes.name: Yakitori Chicken Skewers
dishes.description: Charcoal-grilled chicken skewers basted with tare sauce — thigh meat, skin and all the best parts.

dishes.name: Miso Ramen
dishes.description: Creamy miso-based broth with egg noodles, corn, butter, chashu and a soft-boiled egg. A Hokkaido specialty.

dishes.name: Bibimbap
dishes.description: Mixed rice bowl with seasoned vegetables, gochujang chili paste, sesame oil and a fried egg. A Korean classic.

dishes.name: Korean BBQ (Samgyeopsal)
dishes.description: Grilled thick-cut pork belly slices wrapped in lettuce with garlic, ssamjang and kimchi. Korean BBQ at its best.

dishes.name: Kimchi Jjigae
dishes.description: Spicy, sour kimchi stew with tofu and pork, simmered until deeply flavourful. A Korean home staple.

dishes.name: Japchae
dishes.description: Glass noodles stir-fried with colourful vegetables, beef strips and sesame in a sweet soy sauce.

dishes.name: Tteokbokki
dishes.description: Chewy rice cakes in a fiery sweet-spicy gochujang sauce with fish cakes and spring onion.

dishes.name: Pad Thai
dishes.description: Thailand's iconic stir-fried rice noodle dish with prawns, egg, bean sprouts, peanuts and lime.

dishes.name: Green Curry with Chicken
dishes.description: Fragrant coconut green curry with tender chicken, Thai basil, zucchini and kaffir lime leaves.

dishes.name: Som Tum (Papaya Salad)
dishes.description: Shredded green papaya salad with cherry tomatoes, long beans, peanuts, chili and lime dressing.

dishes.name: Massaman Curry with Beef
dishes.description: Rich slow-cooked Thai Massaman curry with beef, potatoes, peanuts and warm spices in thick coconut gravy.

dishes.name: Tom Kha Gai
dishes.description: Creamy coconut soup with chicken, galangal, lemongrass and mushrooms — milder than tom yam, richly fragrant.

dishes.name: Pho Bo (Beef Noodle Soup)
dishes.description: Clear spiced beef bone broth with rice noodles, rare beef slices, fresh herbs, bean sprouts and hoisin.

dishes.name: Banh Mi
dishes.description: Crispy French baguette filled with pâté, Vietnamese cold cuts, pickled daikon, cucumber, chili and coriander.

dishes.name: Bun Cha
dishes.description: Grilled pork patties and belly served in sweet fish sauce broth with rice vermicelli and fresh herbs.

dishes.name: Goi Cuon (Fresh Spring Rolls)
dishes.description: Light and fresh rice paper rolls filled with shrimp, pork, vermicelli, herbs and served with peanut sauce.

dishes.name: Chicken Tacos
dishes.description: Soft corn tortillas filled with seasoned grilled chicken, salsa, avocado, cheese and lime crema.

dishes.name: Beef Burrito
dishes.description: Large flour tortilla stuffed with seasoned ground beef, rice, black beans, cheese, salsa and sour cream.

dishes.name: Chicken Quesadilla
dishes.description: Crispy flour tortilla filled with grilled chicken, melted cheese and jalapeños, served with guacamole.

dishes.name: Black Bean Bowl
dishes.description: Seasoned black beans with Mexican rice, roasted corn, pico de gallo and lime. Fully plant-based.

dishes.name: Chicken Enchiladas
dishes.description: Corn tortillas stuffed with shredded chicken, rolled and smothered in red chili sauce and melted cheese.

dishes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
dishes.description: Classic Roman pasta with eggs, guanciale (cured pork), Pecorino Romano and black pepper. No cream.

dishes.name: Margherita Pizza
dishes.description: Thin Neapolitan pizza with San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella and basil. Classic simplicity.

dishes.name: Risotto ai Funghi
dishes.description: Creamy Arborio rice slowly cooked with porcini mushrooms, white wine, Parmesan and butter.

dishes.name: Lasagne
dishes.description: Layers of pasta sheets, rich beef bolognese, creamy béchamel and Parmesan, baked golden.

dishes.name: Caprese Salad
dishes.description: Fresh mozzarella, ripe tomatoes and basil drizzled with extra virgin olive oil and balsamic reduction.

dishes.name: Bruschetta with Tomato
dishes.description: Grilled sourdough rubbed with garlic, topped with fresh tomato, basil and olive oil. Light Italian starter.

dishes.name: Tiramisu
dishes.description: Classic Italian coffee dessert — ladyfingers soaked in espresso, layered with mascarpone cream and dusted cocoa.

dishes.name: Greek Salad
dishes.description: Chunky salad of tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, Kalamata olives and feta cheese dressed with olive oil and oregano.

dishes.name: Chicken Souvlaki with Pita
dishes.description: Marinated grilled chicken skewers wrapped in warm pita with tzatziki, tomato and onion.

dishes.name: Moussaka
dishes.description: Baked layers of eggplant, spiced ground lamb and creamy béchamel — the Greek equivalent of lasagne.

dishes.name: Spanakopita
dishes.description: Crispy filo pastry filled with spinach, feta cheese, dill and eggs. A beloved Greek pie.

dishes.name: Chicken Doner Kebab
dishes.description: Seasoned rotisserie chicken carved and served in flatbread with garlic sauce, salad and pickled chili.

dishes.name: Lentil Soup (Mercimek Corbasi)
dishes.description: Silky pureed red lentil soup with cumin, dried mint and a drizzle of paprika butter. Turkish breakfast staple.

dishes.name: Adana Kebab with Lavash
dishes.description: Hand-minced spiced lamb and beef kebab grilled on flat skewers, served with lavash bread and sumac onion.

dishes.name: Chicken Tagine
dishes.description: Slow-braised chicken with preserved lemon, green olives, saffron and herbs in a traditional clay pot tagine.

dishes.name: Lamb Couscous
dishes.description: Fluffy steamed couscous served with slow-cooked spiced lamb, chickpeas and a rich harissa-scented broth.

dishes.name: Harira Soup
dishes.description: Traditional Moroccan tomato and lentil soup with lamb, chickpeas, coriander and smen butter — served at Iftar.

dishes.name: Chicken Shawarma Wrap
dishes.description: Slow-roasted spiced chicken carved thin, wrapped in flatbread with garlic sauce, pickles and salad.

dishes.name: Hummus with Pita
dishes.description: Creamy blended chickpea hummus with tahini, lemon and garlic, drizzled with olive oil and paprika.

dishes.name: Falafel Wrap
dishes.description: Crispy deep-fried chickpea and herb falafel balls in flatbread with tahini, salad and pickles.

dishes.name: Lamb Kofta with Rice
dishes.description: Spiced minced lamb kofta patties grilled on skewers served with saffron rice and yogurt sauce.

dishes.name: Doro Wat
dishes.description: Ethiopia's national dish — slow-cooked whole chicken pieces in fiery berbere spiced onion sauce with hard-boiled eggs.

dishes.name: Misir Wat (Red Lentil Stew)
dishes.description: Spiced red lentil stew with berbere and niter kibbeh served on injera spongy flatbread. Vegan and filling.

dishes.name: Feijoada
dishes.description: Brazil's national black bean stew with pork ribs, sausage and smoked meat served over rice with farofa and orange.

dishes.name: Pão de Queijo
dishes.description: Warm chewy Brazilian cheese bread rolls made from tapioca flour and queijo minas cheese.

dishes.name: Classic Cheeseburger
dishes.description: Juicy beef patty with American cheese, lettuce, tomato, pickles, onion and ketchup in a sesame seed bun.

dishes.name: BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwich
dishes.description: Slow-smoked pulled pork tossed in smoky BBQ sauce served in a brioche bun with coleslaw.

dishes.name: Grilled Chicken Wrap
dishes.description: Chargrilled chicken breast in a whole wheat wrap with romaine, tomato, avocado and honey mustard.

dishes.name: Pancakes with Maple Syrup
dishes.description: Fluffy American-style buttermilk pancakes stacked with maple syrup and a pat of butter.

dishes.name: Clam Chowder
dishes.description: Thick and creamy New England clam chowder with clams, potato, celery and bacon in a bread bowl.

dishes.name: Paella Valenciana
dishes.description: Authentic Spanish rice dish with chicken, rabbit, green beans and rosemary cooked in a wide paella pan.

dishes.name: Patatas Bravas
dishes.description: Crispy fried potato cubes topped with spicy brava sauce and creamy aioli. Classic Spanish tapas.

dishes.name: Gazpacho
dishes.description: Cold blended Andalusian soup of ripe tomatoes, cucumber, pepper, garlic and olive oil. Perfect in summer.

dishes.name: Nasi Goreng
dishes.description: Indonesia's iconic fried rice with shrimp paste, kecap manis, chicken, shrimp and topped with a fried egg.

dishes.name: Mie Goreng
dishes.description: Indonesian stir-fried egg noodles with chicken, cabbage, carrot and kecap manis — sweeter than Malaysian version.

dishes.name: Soto Ayam
dishes.description: Light Indonesian chicken soup with turmeric-golden broth, rice vermicelli, boiled egg and crispy shallots.

dishes.name: Gado-Gado
dishes.description: Indonesian vegetable salad with tofu, tempeh, boiled egg and a rich peanut sauce dressing.

dishes.name: Chicken Adobo
dishes.description: Philippine national dish — chicken braised in soy sauce, vinegar, garlic and bay leaves until tender and tangy.

dishes.name: Sinigang na Baboy
dishes.description: Sour tamarind pork soup with water spinach, eggplant and long beans. Tangy and deeply comforting.

dishes.name: Pancit Canton
dishes.description: Filipino stir-fried egg noodles with pork, shrimp, cabbage and carrots in a savoury soy-oyster sauce.

dishes.name: Chicken Biryani
dishes.description: Aromatic long-grain basmati layered with marinated chicken, fried onions, saffron and whole spices.

dishes.name: Aloo Paratha with Yogurt
dishes.description: Whole wheat flatbread stuffed with spiced mashed potato, served with cool raita yogurt and mango pickle.

dishes.name: Dal Makhani
dishes.description: Rich creamy overnight-cooked black lentil dal with butter, cream and tomato. A Punjabi celebration dish.

dishes.name: Vegetable Biryani
dishes.description: Fragrant basmati rice cooked with mixed vegetables, paneer, fried onions and whole spices.

dishes.name: Asam Pedas Ikan
dishes.description: Fiery and sour fish curry with stingray or mackerel in tamarind-based broth with torch ginger and ladies fingers.

dishes.name: Curry Laksa
dishes.description: Rich coconut curry soup with thick noodles, chicken, tofu puffs, bean sprouts and hard-boiled egg.

dishes.name: Otak-Otak
dishes.description: Spiced fish cake steamed in banana leaf with coconut milk, turmeric and chili. A classic Johor-Muar snack.

dishes.name: Bak Kut Teh
dishes.description: Herbal pork rib soup simmered with garlic, pepper and Chinese herbs. Served with rice and fried dough.

dishes.name: Cendol
dishes.description: Malaysian shaved ice dessert with pandan green jelly noodles, red beans, coconut milk and palm sugar.

dishes.name: Ayam Percik
dishes.description: Grilled chicken marinated in a rich coconut-spice sauce, basted repeatedly over charcoal until caramelized.

dishes.name: Nasi Kerabu
dishes.description: Kelantan blue rice (butterfly pea flower) served with fresh herb salad, grilled fish, coconut, and raw vegetables.

dishes.name: Mee Rebus
dishes.description: Yellow noodles in a thick, sweet potato-based gravy topped with boiled egg, tofu, bean sprouts and crispy shallots.

dishes.name: Chicken and Waffles
dishes.description: Crispy Southern fried chicken on a buttery waffle with maple syrup. American brunch comfort food.

dishes.name: Mushroom Omelette
dishes.description: Fluffy three-egg omelette filled with sautéed mushrooms, spinach and melted cheddar cheese.

dishes.name: Tuna Nicoise Pasta
dishes.description: Cold pasta salad with tuna, green beans, olives, cherry tomatoes and a Dijon vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Smoked Salmon Bagel
dishes.description: Toasted sesame bagel with cream cheese, smoked salmon, capers, red onion and dill.

dishes.name: Beef Stew with Bread
dishes.description: Hearty slow-cooked beef chuck stew with carrots, potato, celery and thyme in a rich red wine gravy.

dishes.name: Egg Salad Sandwich
dishes.description: Creamy egg salad with mayo, dijon, celery and chives between toasted wholemeal bread.

dishes.name: Protein Overnight Oats
dishes.description: High-protein overnight oats with Greek yogurt, chia seeds, protein powder, banana and honey.

dishes.name: Shakshuka
dishes.description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato and pepper sauce with cumin, paprika and feta. Israeli-Middle Eastern brunch favourite.

dishes.name: Club Sandwich
dishes.description: Triple-decker toasted sandwich with turkey, bacon, lettuce, tomato, egg and mayo on white bread.

dishes.name: Caesar Wrap
dishes.description: Classic Caesar salad ingredients wrapped in a large flour tortilla — romaine, chicken, croutons and Caesar dressing.

dishes.name: Fruit Salad Bowl
dishes.description: Fresh seasonal fruit bowl with mango, watermelon, pineapple, grapes and a squeeze of lime.

dishes.name: Cottage Cheese with Fruit
dishes.description: Low-fat cottage cheese topped with sliced berries and a drizzle of honey. High protein, low calorie snack.

dishes.name: Peanut Butter Rice Cake
dishes.description: Crispy rice cakes with peanut butter and banana slices. Simple, filling and portable snack.

dishes.name: Trail Mix
dishes.description: Energy-dense mix of almonds, cashews, dried cranberries, dark chocolate chips and sunflower seeds.

dishes.name: Teh Tarik
dishes.description: Malaysia's beloved pulled milk tea — strong black tea blended with condensed milk, poured high to create froth.

dishes.name: Kuih Lapis
dishes.description: Colourful steamed layered rice flour and coconut milk kuih — sweet, chewy and traditionally Malaysian.

dishes.name: Onigiri (Rice Ball)
dishes.description: Triangular Japanese rice balls filled with tuna mayo or salmon, wrapped in nori seaweed.

dishes.name: Udon Noodle Soup
dishes.description: Thick chewy wheat noodles in a light dashi broth with tempura bits, spring onion and fish cake.

dishes.name: Salmon Teriyaki Bowl
dishes.description: Pan-seared salmon glazed with teriyaki sauce over Japanese rice with edamame and sesame.

dishes.name: Sundubu Jjigae (Soft Tofu Stew)
dishes.description: Spicy bubbling soft tofu stew with seafood, mushrooms and a raw egg cracked in at the end.

dishes.name: Samgyetang (Ginseng Chicken Soup)
dishes.description: Whole baby chicken stuffed with glutinous rice, ginseng and jujube dates, slow-simmered in clear broth.

dishes.name: Pad See Ew
dishes.description: Wide rice noodles stir-fried with Chinese broccoli, egg and beef in sweet black soy sauce.

dishes.name: Mango Sticky Rice
dishes.description: Sweet coconut cream-drenched glutinous rice served with ripe Thai mango. Thailand's most iconic dessert.

dishes.name: Com Tam (Broken Rice)
dishes.description: Vietnamese broken rice with grilled pork chop, shredded pork skin, fried egg, cucumber and fish sauce.

dishes.name: Bun Bo Hue
dishes.description: Spicy lemongrass beef noodle soup from Hue — thicker round noodles in a rich, fragrant chili-lemongrass broth.

dishes.name: Guacamole with Tortilla Chips
dishes.description: Fresh avocado guacamole with lime, cilantro, jalapeño and red onion served with crispy tortilla chips.

dishes.name: Pozole Rojo
dishes.description: Traditional Mexican hominy corn soup with tender pork in a rich dried chili broth, topped with shredded cabbage.

dishes.name: Minestrone Soup
dishes.description: Hearty Italian vegetable soup with cannellini beans, pasta, zucchini, carrots and tomato in herbed broth.

dishes.name: Chicken Piccata
dishes.description: Thin chicken breast cutlets pan-fried in lemon-butter-caper sauce, served with pasta or mashed potato.

dishes.name: Lamb Gyros
dishes.description: Rotisserie lamb carved and served in pita with tzatziki, tomato, red onion and chips.

dishes.name: Avgolemono Soup
dishes.description: Silky Greek chicken-lemon-egg soup — rice in a broth thickened with eggs and fresh lemon juice.

dishes.name: Menemen
dishes.description: Turkish scrambled eggs cooked with tomatoes, green peppers and spices. The quintessential Turkish breakfast.

dishes.name: Imam Bayildi
dishes.description: Eggplant stuffed with slow-cooked onions, tomatoes, garlic and herbs in olive oil. A meze classic.

dishes.name: Bastilla (Chicken Pie)
dishes.description: Sweet-savoury Moroccan pie with shredded chicken, eggs and almonds in crispy warqa pastry dusted with sugar.

dishes.name: Fattoush Salad
dishes.description: Lebanese bread salad with crispy fried pita, tomato, cucumber, radish, sumac and pomegranate molasses.

dishes.name: Kafta Bil Saniyeh
dishes.description: Lebanese baked minced beef and lamb patties with onions, tomatoes and potatoes in spiced tomato sauce.

dishes.name: Rendang Daging
dishes.description: Indonesian slow-cooked dry beef curry with coconut milk and aromatic spices until nearly dry. Rich and intense.

dishes.name: Sate Ayam
dishes.description: Indonesian grilled chicken skewers with turmeric marinade, served with peanut sauce and lontong rice cake.

dishes.name: Kare-Kare
dishes.description: Filipino oxtail and peanut stew in a rich yellow sauce served with fermented shrimp paste (bagoong).

dishes.name: Arroz Caldo
dishes.description: Filipino chicken and ginger congee topped with fried garlic, hard-boiled egg and toasted garlic. Comforting and healing.

dishes.name: Coxinha (Chicken Croquette)
dishes.description: Teardrop-shaped fried dough filled with shredded chicken and catupiry cream cheese. Brazil's most popular street snack.

dishes.name: Acai Bowl
dishes.description: Thick blended frozen acai with banana topped with granola, honey, coconut flakes and fresh berries.

dishes.name: Tibs
dishes.description: Pan-fried spiced beef or lamb with onions, jalapeños, rosemary and tomatoes. Served with injera.

dishes.name: Buffalo Chicken Wings
dishes.description: Crispy baked chicken wings tossed in buttery Frank's hot sauce, served with blue cheese dip and celery.

dishes.name: Mac and Cheese
dishes.description: Creamy homemade macaroni and cheese with sharp cheddar béchamel, baked with a golden breadcrumb crust.

dishes.name: Gambas al Ajillo
dishes.description: Spanish garlic prawns sautéed in olive oil with dried chili and sherry. Classic tapas served with crusty bread.

dishes.name: Tortilla Española
dishes.description: Classic Spanish egg and potato omelette cooked slowly in olive oil, served at room temperature.

dishes.name: Poached Eggs on Toast
dishes.description: Two perfectly poached eggs on sourdough toast with avocado and a sprinkle of chili flakes.

dishes.name: Lemon Herb Grilled Salmon
dishes.description: Fillet of salmon marinated in lemon, garlic and herbs, grilled and served with steamed broccoli and rice.

dishes.name: Chocolate Protein Smoothie
dishes.description: Thick blended shake with chocolate protein powder, banana, almond milk, peanut butter and cocoa.

dishes.name: Roast Vegetable Quinoa Bowl
dishes.description: Roasted seasonal vegetables over fluffy quinoa with feta, rocket and lemon tahini dressing.

dishes.name: Full English Breakfast
dishes.description: The classic British fry-up: eggs, bacon, sausages, beans, grilled tomato, mushrooms and toast.

dishes.name: Corn on the Cob (Jagung Bakar)
dishes.description: Malaysian grilled corn on the cob basted with butter, margarine and sweet soy sauce. Street food staple.

dishes.name: Roti John
dishes.description: Malaysian-style omelette sandwich — baguette filled with spiced minced chicken and egg, pan-fried in butter.

dishes.name: Kimchi Pancake (Kimchijeon)
dishes.description: Crispy savoury Korean pancake made with kimchi and spring onion batter, dipped in soy-vinegar sauce.

dishes.name: Dates with Almonds
dishes.description: Medjool dates stuffed with whole almonds — a traditional Middle Eastern energy-dense snack.

dishes.name: Mochi Ice Cream
dishes.description: Soft Japanese rice cake filled with ice cream — matcha, strawberry or vanilla. A delicate Japanese sweet.

dishes.name: Lomo Saltado
dishes.description: Peruvian stir-fry of beef strips, tomatoes, yellow chili and onions tossed with chips and served over rice.

dishes.name: Ceviche
dishes.description: Fresh raw fish cured in lime juice with red onion, chili, coriander and sweet potato. Peru's national dish.

dishes.name: Asado (Argentine BBQ)
dishes.description: Classic Argentine wood-fire grilled beef ribs, sausages and offal with chimichurri sauce.

dishes.name: Empanadas
dishes.description: Golden baked pastry pockets filled with spiced ground beef, olives and hard-boiled egg. Argentine street food.

dishes.name: Jollof Rice with Chicken
dishes.description: West African one-pot tomato rice cooked in a rich tomato-pepper base with grilled chicken and fried plantain.

dishes.name: Egusi Soup with Pounded Yam
dishes.description: Nigerian melon seed soup with spinach, stockfish and palm oil served alongside smooth pounded yam.

dishes.name: Peking Duck Pancakes
dishes.description: Crispy roast duck with thin pancakes, hoisin sauce, spring onion and cucumber. Chinese banquet showpiece.

dishes.name: Hot Pot (Individual)
dishes.description: Individual Chinese hot pot with spicy mala broth, thinly sliced beef, tofu, mushrooms and vegetables.

dishes.name: Nasi Dagang
dishes.description: Steamed glutinous and long-grain rice cooked in coconut milk with fenugreek, served with tuna curry (gulai ikan tongkol).

dishes.name: Kway Chap
dishes.description: Penang-style braised pork offal served in flat rice sheet noodles with dark soy broth, tofu and braised egg.

dishes.name: Claypot Chicken Rice
dishes.description: Smoky claypot rice with marinated chicken, Chinese sausage and mushrooms, steamed together in a clay pot.

dishes.name: Pav Bhaji
dishes.description: Mumbai street food — spiced mashed vegetable curry served with buttered pav buns and raw onion with lime.

dishes.name: Tandoori Chicken
dishes.description: Marinated chicken grilled in a clay tandoor oven until charred, served with naan, raita and sliced onions.

dishes.name: Paya (Trotters Soup)
dishes.description: Slow-cooked lamb trotters in aromatic spiced broth with ginger and garlic. Pakistani breakfast comfort.

dishes.name: Greek Yogurt Bowl with Granola
dishes.description: Thick creamy Greek yogurt with homemade granola, honey, sliced almonds and fresh blueberries.

dishes.name: Chicken Noodle Soup
dishes.description: Classic comforting chicken soup with egg noodles, carrots, celery and fresh thyme. Great when sick or cold.

dishes.name: Boiled Sweet Potato
dishes.description: Simply boiled or steamed sweet potato — a natural, clean carbohydrate source rich in beta-carotene.

dishes.name: Tuna Rice (Meal Prep)
dishes.description: Simple high-protein meal prep bowl — canned tuna over rice with soy sauce, sesame and cucumber.

dishes.name: Peanut Butter Banana Toast
dishes.description: Whole grain toast spread with peanut butter, topped with banana slices and a drizzle of honey.

dishes.name: Yakisoba
dishes.description: Japanese stir-fried wheat noodles with pork, cabbage, carrots and Worcestershire-based yakisoba sauce.

dishes.name: Khao Pad (Thai Fried Rice)
dishes.description: Fragrant Thai-style fried rice with egg, spring onion, tomato and fish sauce, served with cucumber and lime.

dishes.name: Sup Tulang (Bone Marrow Soup)
dishes.description: Malaysian spiced mutton bone soup with bone marrow, potatoes and a rich red-tinged broth served with French loaf.

price_note: Prices are hawker/mamak baseline (RM). Apply multipliers: home-cooked ×0.35, hawker ×1.0, casual restaurant ×1.6, premium restaurant ×2.5
